title: 第1節　ベランダの深呼吸
chapterTitle: 第3章　朝を持ち帰る

prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第3章　朝を持ち帰る / 第2話　汗が引くまで. Scene focus: 第1節　ベランダの深呼吸 / セラパート. Summary: 向かいのビルの屋上では、作業員ヘルメットをかぶった男が折りたたみ式のアンテナを開いていた。さらに隣の建物の外階段にも、双眼鏡を持つ監視役が一人。帰宅後の静止時間を押さえるための… Key beats: 向かいのビルの屋上では、作業員ヘルメットをかぶった男が折りたたみ式のアンテナを開いていた。さらに隣の建物の外階段にも、双眼鏡を持つ監視役が一人。帰宅後の静止時間を押さえるための最後の網だろう。ここまでくると暗殺未遂というより執念の問題だった。 セラはマンション裏の非常階段を使い、屋上の死角へ一気に回り込んだ。ジョギングのままの身体はまだ温まっていて、踏み込みが軽い。猫耳カチューシャ型の警護支援ユニットが視線の交差を示す。二点。同時。ならば片方を景色から消し、片方を時間から外せば足りる。 「クールダウンの時間まで観測しないでください」 アンテナ役の手首へワイヤーを巻き、支柱ごと引き倒す。金属音は出さず、ただ道具だけが使えなくなる。男が振り返る前に膝が入り、ヘルメットの顎紐だけが揺れた。外階段の監視役は視線を上げた瞬間、セラの投げた小片で双眼鏡を弾かれる。片手を離したところへ移動し、肩口を打つ。体勢を崩した相手を手すりの内側へ折り返せば、もう十分だった。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sera-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sera-part of the same balcony-cooldown incident as scene-003-002-001-sato. Keep the same apartment exterior relationship, same balcony line, and same late-spring morning light as the paired image. Sato must remain an unaware background figure cooling down inside or at the balcony, and must face away from the incident or look out into open space rather than toward Sera. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a cute maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Create a restrained rooftop-or-opposite-building action image with Sera dominant as she cuts off lingering surveillance around the apartment block. Keep Sato smaller in the background, cooling down and unaware.
